headline: Top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index during Thursday's after-hours session.

headline: Jabil Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., April 23, 2026--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share of common stock to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The dividend is payable on June 2, 2026.

headline: Is Sanmina Stock a Smart Buy Ahead of Q2 Earnings Release?
summary: SANM heads into fiscal Q2 earnings with strong AI infrastructure demand tailwinds, but macro pressures, supply chain issues cloud outlook.
